search.title: Month in review: October 2023
search.text: month review: october 2023 inspired by melanie richards’ learning logs ’m starting this series document things that happened each month reason calling “learning logs” feel very productive selfimprovement area most time “month review” seems lighter ’ll try best remember what did keep going promises thoughoctober started with wife making down payment our new apartment are still waiting bank finish their part paperwork all goes well should have home around end november fabio haag type team from left right: eduilson coan sofia mohr ana laydner haagaround middle there team meetup formal make sound remote nice see one another face once while had lunches beers worked little bit well fun :) smaller news ’s been while ps4 wouldn’t boot finally took repair shop evaluation only used play rocket league (which become kinda toxic) when guests didn’t interested getting fixed instead proposed exchange bricked pair joy‑cons they accepted small win! towards restarted blog that’s something worth celebratingreading #’ve trying ditch youtube before bedtime read book instead problem depending reading get sleepy quickly takes ages anything lunch myself during week figured take kindle use time effectivethis finished reading truman capote’s classic cold blood retelling holcomb murders detailed sure least half he narrates really happen read regardless also more recent memoir how murder your life cat marnell autobiography highfunctioning drug addict working fashion publishing industry rollercoaster author herself recognizes there’s about downfall rich privileged people makes hard us look away surprisingly page turnerwatching #’ve watched first season el encargado ( charge) have seasons taskmaster! bear favorite episode far 7 “review” watch show does immediatly main characters fall love other let’s hope keeps like second seasonlistening # songs ’ve added deezer tracks:popstar researching oblivion flotation toy warninghappiness hobo johnsonhayloft ii mother motherleft hand free altjbitch allie xelephant woman blonde redheaddna anna f grew tired many podcasts usually listen giving them break other hand binge listening books could kill loving similar vibe underunderstood which like enjoying latest episodes search engine theme song incredibly catchy)writing out looks eventful than usual november will bring!

search.title: Kerning in PowerPoint
search.text: kerning powerpoint microsoft word expects data gpos table old style kern this how make work both apps glyphs first prepare font using flattener script by mekkablue will open copy current document turn all group into glyph set some other parameters export new document somewhere ttf close file there’s need save needed anymore then extract table exported fonts xml ttx following terminal command that couple files:ttx t o somefontregularkernxml somefontregularttfttx somefontboldkernxml somefontboldttf don’t like having bunch duplicate ttfs laying around trip immediately delete fontsback original glyphs file usual then time merge extracted above with final fonts command:ttx m somefontregularttf somefontregularkernxmlttx somefontboldttf somefontboldkernxmlalternatively possible via python creating empty ttfont object importing copying over something this:from fonttoolsttlib import ttfontttf_file = "somefontregularttf"kern_file "somefontregularkernxml"ttf_font ttfont(ttf_file)kern_font ttfont()kern_fontimportxml(kern_file)ttf_font["kern"] kern_font["kern"]ttf_fontsave(ttf_file) have tested stylistic sets (unencoded glyphs) which values surprisingly those works does affect powerpoint working :version 2309 365version 1678 mac

search.title: Type Cooker: auxiliary
search.text: type cooker: auxiliary first exercise using typecooker flex creativity this took longer than ’d like admit ’m still really happy with way strokes join crotch areas hey need let them gotypecooker parameters:construction: romanstroke endings: straight serifcontrast amount: visiblecontrast type: translationwidth: narrowweight: light

search.title: Bebop
search.text: bebop what amazing piece software opens instantly with keyboard ready go type your thoughts into tap save note saves folder have configured starts new blank just perfect! came across yesterday installer newsletter ’m looking forward integrating workflowalso lovely shade yellow

search.title: My default apps for 2024
search.text: default apps 2024 first saw this kind post chris coyier’s blog last year recently popping other blogs (jcprobably kev quirk come mind) decided give try📨 mail service: fastmail gmail (work) 📮 client: via safari web app apple 📁 file manager: forklift 4 📝 notes: obsidian ia writer raycast notes ✅ : things 3 📆 calendar: calendar 🙍🏻‍♂️ contacts: contacts 🗞️ rss: netnewswire ⌨️ launcher: switched from launchbar everything except files folders which now use folder x ☁️ cloud storage: dropbox &amp; icloud 🛟 backups: arq 🌅 photo library: 🎨 editing: photos lightroom ios processing 📸 screenshots: cleanshot hustl timelapses 🌎 browser: 💬 chat: whatsapp 🔖 bookmarks: 📑 read later: open tabs safari unfortunately 📚 reading: kindle paperwhite (7th gen) mobile devices 📜 word processing: pages 📈 spreadsheets: numbers 📊 presentations: adobe indesign 🛒 shopping lists: grocery 💰 personal finance: ynab 🎵 music: deezer music 🎙️ podcasts: pocket casts 🔎 search: kagi duckduckgo 🧮 code editor: sublime text zed most 📔 git fork ⏱️ timesheets: tim some related practice🖌️ designing fonts: glyphs 📏 kerning: kern 🔬 inspecting: dtl otmaster 89 💯 testing: font bakery fontgoggles microsoft office windows mac cc textedit etc

search.title: Media Notes #01
search.text: media notes #01 this list tv shows movies books interesting music consumed recently idea here document every single thing chronological order some things watched read listened that resonated with watched #pablo &amp; luisão season 1 #this brazilian equivalent everybody hates chris: biographical series even more absurd hilarious paulo vieira shows his poor upbringing focus relationship mishaps between father father’s best friend kinds stories nobody believes true rehearsal 2 # nathan show blurs lines what’s real after finishing naively searched information about last episode soon realized there’s point doing thattaskmaster australia 3 #watching taskmaster during dinner our friday night routine atypical didn’t hate any contestants90day fiancé uk seasons 13 # never big reality fan changed year ’s nice analyze these situations reflect who’s fault each one apart from that thinking really necessary can just unwind know they are scripted edited inflate everything stopped caringlol brasil 4 porta dos fundos had good laughs overall found crass jokes were too frequentdaaaaaalí! # only movie list unfortunately trailer gave impression comedy all fit into those minutes okay maybe who get read # little life by hanya yanagihara hard one took almost 5 months finish tend sympathize struggles super rich ( probably will) jude’s suffering will stay something crossed mind before makes complete sense legal system exists enforce laws they’re written deliver justice sometimes fairbreakfast champions kurt vonnegut remember liked cat’s craddle when read 20 years ago resonate wasn’t right little lifeyoga emmanuel carrère book yoga meditation depression terrorism humanitarian crisis what expected waylistened #alan sparhawk trampled turtles album brutal grief losing lifelong partner mimi parker felt throughout screaming song filled eyes tears than once scholars car seat headrest don’t know how haven’t heard before went back other albums experimentation new rock opera takes place fictional college named parnassus university songs gethsemane planet desperation favorites being opera 11 19 minutes longni ishanai ~ floresta futuro kayatibu #’ve been trying listen diverse music: sung english pop/rock episode altlatino featured nai basa masheri yaka huni kuin which led ni ishanai unlike anything ’ve alternates portuguese their native language far tell hantxa kuin mesmerizing highly recommend listen side note “world music” bad term this fact classified “pop spanish” apple infuriating

search.title: On parental love
search.text: parental love every often think about this quote from little life by hanya yanagihara: have never been one those people – know ’re either who thinks that child superior more meaningful grander kind than any other didn’t feel before jacob after his birth singular love because whose foundation physical attraction pleasure intellect fear known fear until child maybe what tricks us into thinking magnificent itself magnificenteven though wife don’t want kids always hits
